text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

111 
INFRMTL_ENCTR_IND_SW 
LABEL: 
Informational Encounter Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: The indicator switch used to identify if a beneficiary is enrolled in a Managed Care Organization (MCO). 
SHORT NAME: INFRMTL_ENCTR_IND_SW 
LONG NAME: INFRMTL_ENCTR_IND_SW 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes, beneficiary is a Managed care enrollee (hospital expects to receive payment from an MCO)
